commits.author: JPLRepoRocketWerkz
lines: A Little caching goes a long way. Caching matrix asmb frame values on Parts.

commits.author: Morrow
lines: Updated the IVA assets.
Added new part module for 'attached internals' which are parts that should be spawned alongside other parts.
Fixed some problems with the raytracing implementation after the inclusion of more instanced rendering in the IVA assets.

commits.author: MattCaradusRW
lines: Improved Blending between Earth Ambient Sounds.
Added Ambient sound for high altitude, poles and a generic sound to help blend between biomes.
Added Hpf and Lpf filters can now be set by sound Parameters.

commits.author: Morrow
lines: Fixed a spot where shared memory may offset incorrectly.
Attempted fix for a barrier sync problem on AMD causing rapid flickering.

commits.author: JPLRepoRocketWerkz
lines: Missed on cached value from earlier today on Part asmb frame caching.
Skip the caching in the Debug Vehicle Editor for now as it breaks the raycasting.

commits.author: Morrow
lines: Temporarily disabled a translucency pass in the editor until barriers can be audited.

commits.author: lghassen
lines: Fix glitchy engine highlighting on AMD due to an unrelated uninitialized varying in the vertex shader

commits.author: Maxwell Johnson
lines: Reenabled translucency pass in the editor after auditing barriers.

commits.author: JPLRepoRocketWerkz
lines: Fixed stage, sequence, and resource part highlighting.

commits.author: Maxwell Johnson
lines: Depth from the prepass is now copied into the framebuffers depth before rendering. This means that vessels now properly occlude fragments.
Prepass renderer now supports multisampling.
Raytracing renderer now supports multisampling for initalizing ray position and direction.
Temporarily disabled Kittens rendering into the prepass.
Character renderers now use DepthCompareOp GreaterOrEqual instead of Greater.
Added bug where when in raytraced IVA, planets are not visible through the window.

commits.author: Maxwell Johnson
lines: Moved raytracingRenderers translucent meshes out of the opaque prepass and into the translucent prepass. This fixes the artifacts from my previous commit, but removes reflections on glass in the IVA.

commits.author: JPLRepoRocketWerkz
lines: Added ability to right click EVA Kittens to open context window UI.
Added KittenEVA constructor to spawn Kittens with all required data and no VehicleTemplate required.

commits.author: Morrow
lines: Fixed a silent failure in device shared memory and added some more debug logging.

commits.author: Maxwell Johnson
lines: Added MSAA texture support to raytracing denoiser to fix validation errors.

commits.author: JPLRepoRocketWerkz
lines: Added EVADoor part Module. This module allows us to highlight and add part context option to the UI to EVA a kitten.
Added ability to EVA a kitten from an EVADoor module. First Pass. Will randomly spawn a new Kitten each time for now. But watch out for crew manifests in the future.
Added ability for an EVA kitten to enter an EVADoor. For now the kitten will be destroyed. But watch out for crew manifests in the future.
NOTE: This functionality will be enabled once parts are changed to have EVADoor modules incorporated into them. For now - no parts have this functionality.

commits.author: Maxwell Johnson
lines: Added FreeDescriptorSetBit to global DescriptorPool to prevent allocation leak.

commits.author: Morrow
lines: Fixed the dynamic mesh indirect vert shader not setting the proper draw index causing incorrect textures.

commits.author: Maxwell Johnson
lines: Fix image layout validation errors when present in vehicle editor.

commits.author: Maxwell Johnson
lines: Fixed image layout validation error caused by changing MSAA settings in editor.

commits.author: Maxwell Johnson
lines: Added WIP support for raytraced reflections using the prepasses translucent textures instead of opaque textures. This allows for multiple opaque materials to have accurate raytraced output when viewed through a translucent mesh. It also will let us bring back reflections on the IVAs windows. Currently there is no visible impact from this change.
